goal: Add a side-effect-free authority builder that records a release-governance approved-action artifact from ready action preflight while keeping action consume, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready release-governance approved-action preflight can produce a side-effect-free action authorization artifact.
Action id, authorizer, and expiry refs are required.
Action consume, merge, and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual action consumption, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing action id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-110 preflighted release-governance approved action without authorizing consumption, merge, or external action.
